subcodes.title: Words spoken at Pleiades Sylvan Bower, Alhammeh near Tiberias, 1914-05-14
subcodes.first_line: In the world of humanity, every person is stimulated by a certain objective-point
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
